overall.description: A first-person exploration of a Ravenclaw-style gothic dormitory room from a video game, featuring stone walls, wooden ceiling beams, blue-draped bunk beds, and medieval furnishings. The camera slowly moves through the interior space, revealing sleeping areas, tall gothic windows, house banners, and a study nook.

scene_state.functional_zone: entryway of gothic dormitory with wooden door and map

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory room and observing the stone walls, wooden door, and first bunk bed structure

entered.detail: dark wooden panel door with metal handle near the entrance
blue-tinted map or tapestry hanging on the stone wall
large wooden bunk bed with heavy blue silk drapes and canopy
heavy blue fabric curtains hanging from the bed canopy and windows
gothic stone arch framing the bed structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the entrance of a medieval-style dormitory room. A wooden door with a wall map is visible on the left, while ahead stands a large four-poster bunk bed draped in blue silk. The stone walls and wooden floor establish the gothic architecture as the camera slowly advances into the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: central dormitory area with main four-poster bed and tall windows

events.description: moving closer to the tall gothic windows increases the natural illumination on the bed and furniture

agents.ego_description: moving toward the center of the room to examine the main bed, antique white dresser, and tall window

entered.detail: tall arched window with diamond-patterned leaded glass panes
ornate white wooden dresser with decorative items on top

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the central area of the dormitory, revealing a tall gothic window behind the main four-poster bed. An antique white dresser sits beneath the window, and the blue silk drapes are now seen in greater detail. The entry door and map disappear from view as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: right side of dormitory with secondary bunk bed and wardrobe

agents.ego_description: continuing to the right side of the room to view the second bunk bed, tall wardrobe, and wall banners

entered.detail: second wooden bunk bed with blue drapes positioned against the right wall
tall pale blue wooden wardrobe with paneled doors
blue and bronze house banner with eagle crest hanging on the stone wall
secondary decorative banner with blue and gold patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera reveals the right side of the dormitory, showing a second four-poster bunk bed and a tall pale wooden wardrobe. Two house banners become visible on the far wall—one clearly displaying the Ravenclaw eagle. The main bed and dresser move to the left of the frame as the camera continues its rightward exploration.

scene_state.functional_zone: study area with desk, banners, and exit door

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the house banners and wooden ceiling beams

agents.ego_description: examining the wall banners above, then looking down at the study desk and exit door area

entered.detail: dark wooden desk with books and items arranged on the surface
white wooden chair with decorative cutout backrest
white arched door with decorative stonework frame leading to exit
floating wooden shelves holding books and decorative objects
tall oval mirror with white frame mounted on the wall
wooden coat rack with blue fabric item hanging

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the study area at the far end of the dormitory. The camera pans up to show the Ravenclaw banners and wooden ceiling beams, then down to reveal a study desk with an ornate white chair, wall-mounted shelves, and an arched exit door. The beds and wardrobe are now behind the camera as the exploration concludes at the room's far corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the entrance of a gothic dormitory into the depths of a scholarly living space. It begins at a wooden door beside a wall map, advancing slowly past a large four-poster bunk bed draped in blue silk. As the camera moves further into the room, the entrance fades from view to reveal a tall gothic window and an antique white dresser positioned beneath it. The perspective then shifts rightward, gliding past a second bunk bed and a pale wooden wardrobe to uncover house banners, including the Ravenclaw eagle, on the far wall. Finally, the camera pans upward toward the heavy wooden ceiling beams before tilting down to settle on a study nook featuring an ornate white chair, wall-mounted shelves, and an arched exit door.
